description: Generate API reference documentation for VS Code's Diagnostic API
local_clone_commands: git clone --filter=blob:none --no-checkout https://github.com/microsoft/vscode.git repo && cd repo && git checkout 69d110f2fe9decdf0b4f79f894f23b3c1967bcb2 && git sparse-checkout init --cone && git sparse-checkout set src/vs/vscode.d.ts src/vs/workbench extensions && git checkout
dependency_hints: apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends git ca-certificates && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*
apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends git ca-certificates python3 curl && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*
